records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: ʿAbd al-Karīm b. ʿAmr b. Ṣāliḥ, al-Khathʿamī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 16 - ʿAbd al-Karīm b. ʿAmr b. Ṣāliḥ, al-Khathʿamī, their client.  Kufan.  Had the laqab of “Karrām”.  The Wāqifa claim him (as one of their own), and the ghulāt narrate a lot from him.
records.arabicText: 16 - عبد الكريم بن عمرو بن صالح، الخثعمي، مولاهم، كوفي، يلقب " كراما ". الواقفة تدعيه، والغلاة تروي عنه كثيرا.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 17 - ʿAbd al-Ḥamīd b. Abī al-Daylam – and he is the son of the uncle of Muʿallā b. Khunays.  Weak.
records.arabicText: 17 - عبد الحميد بن أبي الديلم - وهو ابن عم معلى بن خنيس -. ضعيف.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Aslam, al-Ṭabarī, al-Ḥalabī, Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 18 – Muḥammad b. Aslam, al-Ṭabarī, al-Ḥalabī, Abū Jaʿfar.  His origin was Kufan.  He used to do commerce to Tabaristan.  A ghālī, corrupt in ḥadīth.  He narrated from al-Riḍā . عليه السلام
records.arabicText: 18 - محمد بن أسلم، الطبري، الحلبي، أبو جعفر، أصله كوفي، كان يتجر إلى طبرستان. غال، فاسد الحديث. روى عن الرضا (عليه السلام).

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. ʿAbdullāh, al-Jaʿfarī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 19 – Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. ʿAbdullāh, al-Jaʿfarī.  Narrated from ʿAlī b. Muḥammad alʿUbaydī, the Ṣāḥib of the Zanj in Basra.  ʿUmāra b. Zayd narrated from him – also – and he is one whose ḥadīth is denied.
records.arabicText: 19 - محمد بن الحسن بن عبد الله، الجعفري. روى عنه علي بن محمد العبيدي صاحب الزنج بالبصرة، وروى عنه عمارة بن زيد - أيضا -. وهو منكر الحديث.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 20 – Muḥammad b. Muṣādif, client of Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  He narrated from his father.  Thiqa.
records.arabicText: 20 - محمد بن مصادف، مولى أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). روى عن أبيه. ثقة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Nuqayʿ b. al-Ḥārith, Abū Dāwud, al-Sabīʿī, al-Hamdānī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 21 – Nuqayʿ b. al-Ḥārith, Abū Dāwud, al-Sabīʿī, al-Hamdānī.  Narrated from Abū Barza Naḍla b. Abī ʿAbdillāh al-Aslamī, and narrated from Abū Jaʿfar  عليه السلام .  In his ḥadīth there is (material that is) not recognized, and what I regard (to be appropriate) is to halt with his ḥadīth.  And it is permissible for him to be brought out as a witness.
records.arabicText: 21 - نفيع بن الحارث، أبو داوود، السبيعي، الهمداني. روى عن أبي برزة نضلة بن أبي عبد الله الأسلمي، وروى عن أبي جعفر (عليه السلام). وفي حديثه مناكير. والذي أراه التوقف في حديثه، ويجوز أن يخرج شاهدا.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 22 – Hishām b. Ibrāhīm, al-ʿAbbāsī.  Companion of Yūnus.  He has been accused, and the accusation – according to me – is regarding his madhhab, not regarding himself.
records.arabicText: 22 - هشام بن إبراهيم، العباسي، صاحب يونس. طعن عليه، والطعن - عندي - في مذهبه، لا في نفسه.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Qays, Abū Naṣr, al-Asadī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 23 – Muḥammad b. Qays, Abū Naṣr, al-Asadī.  Thiqa thiqa.
records.arabicText: 23 - محمد بن قيس، أبو نصر، الأسدي. ثقة، ثقة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. al-Walīd, Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 24 – Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. al-Walīd, Abū Jaʿfar.  Thiqa thiqa.
records.arabicText: 24 - محمد بن الحسن بن الوليد، أبو جعفر. ثقة، ثقة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 25 – Muḥammad b. Muḥammad b. Ribāṭ.  Thiqa thiqa.
records.arabicText: 25 - محمد بن محمد بن رباط. ثقة، ثقة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 26 – Hishām b. Sālim, al-Jawālīqī.  Thiqa thiqa.
records.arabicText: 26 - هشام بن سالم، الجواليقي. ثقة، ثقة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Isḥāq b. Muḥammad, al-Baṣrī, Abū Yaʿqūb
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 27 – Isḥāq b. Muḥammad, al-Baṣrī, Abū Yaʿqūb.  Corrupt in madhhab.
records.arabicText: 27 - إسحاق بن محمد، البصري، أبو يعقوب. فاسد المذهب.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 28 – Ḥudhayfa b. al-Khuzāʿī, their client.  Narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام and Abū alḤasan Mūsā  عليه السلام .  The sound and the unsound are narrated from him.
records.arabicText: 28 - حذيفة بن الخزاعي، مولاهم. روى عن أبي عبد الله، وأبي الحسن موسى (عليهما السلام). يروى عنه الصحيح والسقيم.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: al-Ḥusayn b. Abī Saʿīd, Hāshim b. Ḥayyān, al-Mukārī, Abū ʿAbdillāh
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 29 – al-Ḥusayn b. Abī Saʿīd, Hāshim b. Ḥayyān, al-Mukārī, Abū ʿAbdillāh.  In the group of the Wāqifīs.
records.arabicText: 29 - الحسين بن أبي سعيد، هاشم بن حيان، المكاري، أبو عبد الله. في جملة الواقفة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: al-Ḥusayn b. Aḥmad b. al-Mughīra, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Bushanjī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 30 – al-Ḥusayn b. Aḥmad b. al-Mughīra, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Bushanjī, ʿIraqi.  Confused in madhhab, thiqa in his narration.
records.arabicText: 30 - الحسين بن أحمد بن المغيرة، أبو عبد الله، البوشنجي، عراقي، مضطرب المذهب. ثقة في روايته.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 31 – al-Ḥusayn b. Asad al-Baṣrī.  Narrates from the weak narrators.
records.arabicText: 31 - الحسين بن أسد البصري. يروي عن الضعفاء.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 32 – Hamdan, Abū Jaʿfar.  Weak
records.arabicText: 32 - حمدان، أبو جعفر. ضعيف.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 33 – Sulaymān b. ʿAbdullāh, al-Daylamī.  Narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  He is nothing.
records.arabicText: 33 - سليمان بن عبد الله، الديلمي. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). ليس بشيء.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 34 – Sulaym b. Qays al-Hilālī.  No one but Abān b. Abī ʿAyyash has narrated from him.  And in his book there are notorious unrecognized (things).  And I do not deem it to be but fabricated.
records.arabicText: 34 - سليم بن قيس الهلالي. لم يرو عنه إلا أبان بن أبي عياش. وفي الكتاب مناكير مشتهرة، وما أظنه إلا موضوعا.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 35 – Ṣāliḥ b. Saʿīd, al-Aḥwal.  Weak.
records.arabicText: 35 - صالح بن سعيد، الأحول. ضعيف.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Sabāḥ b. Bashīr b. Yaḥyā, al-Muqri’, Abū Muḥammad
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 36 – Sabāḥ b. Bashīr b. Yaḥyā, al-Muqri’, Abū Muḥammad.  Narrated from Abū Jaʿfar عليه السلام and Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  Zaydī.
records.arabicText: 36 - صباح بن بشير بن يحيى، المقرئ، أبو محمد. روى عن أبي جعفر، وأبي عبد الله (عليهما السلام). زيدي.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 37 - ʿAbd al-Mālik b. al-Mundhir, al-Qummī.  The Wāqifīs claim him, and narrate much from him.
records.arabicText: 37 - عبد الملك بن المنذر، القمي. الواقفية تدعيه، وتروي عنه كثيرا. وأرى ترك حديثه إلا في شاهد.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Sinān, Abū ʿĪsā
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 38 – Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Sinān, Abū ʿĪsā.  His lineage and his ḥadīth are confused.
records.arabicText: 38 - محمد بن أحمد بن محمد بن سنان، أبو عيسى. نسبه وحديثه مضطرب.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 39 – Muḥammad b. al-Walīd, al-Ṣayrafī.  Weak.
records.arabicText: 39 - محمد بن الوليد، الصيرفي. ضعيف.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: al-Muʿtaqal (likely an error for al-Mufaḍḍal) b. ʿUmar, al-Juʿfī, Abū ʿAbdillāh
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 40 – al-Muʿtaqal (likely an error for al-Mufaḍḍal) b. ʿUmar, al-Juʿfī, Abū ʿAbdillāh.  According to me he is thiqa in himself, however his ḥadīths – all of them – are unrecognized, and nothing is cleared from his ḥadīth that is permissible to rely upon.
records.arabicText: 40 - المعتقل بن عمر، الجعفي، أبو عبد الله. هو عندي في نفسه ثقة، لكن أحاديثه كلها مناكير، وليس يخلص من حديثه شيء يجوز أن يعول عليه.
